name: Sunny Garlic Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop the garlic.
2. Combine all other ingredients in a large saucepan.
3. Bring to a slow boil over medium heat.
4. Reduce the mixture by one-third, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the chopped garlic and continue cooking for about 10 minutes.
6. Allow the chutney to cool before serving.
7. The recipe yields approximately 2½ cups.
